message:
fix(bench): replace NumPy with actual Polars DataFrame API

- bench_analytics: use pl.col().sum(), pl.group_by().agg()
- bench_embedding_pipeline: use pl.col().map_elements(l2_normalize)
- bench_hybrid_search: use pl.col().map_elements(cosine_sim)
- bench_rag_pipeline: use pl.col().map_elements().sort().head()
- bench_tiered_dispatch: use pl.col().map_elements(dot_product)
- bench_inprocess: use (df_a["val"] * df_b["val"]).sum()
- bench_vector_ops: use DataFrame column operations

All "Polars" benchmarks now actually use Polars API, not NumPy

files.patch:
